name: Buttercup Squash Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Cut squash into quarters; remove seeds.
Place cut side down in an ungreased shallow baking pan. Bake at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes or until tender. Cool slightly.
2. Grease a 1-quart casserole dish. Scoop squash pulp from skin and place in a medium bowl, discarding the skin. Add brown sugar, salt, cinnamon, 1/4 teaspoon nutmeg, and margarine to the squash. Mix with a potato masher or fork until well blended. Spoon into the greased casserole dish. Sprinkle with chives and 1/8 teaspoon nutmeg.
3. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
